demographics.living_situation: lives at home with her husband

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I'm freezing and shaking uncontrollably, my right side is in agony, and my husband says my eyes have turned yellow.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It all came on over the last few hours and it's getting worse fast — the shaking chills started a couple of hours ago and now I can't stop being sick.

symptom_narrative.onset: the pain started about 6 hours ago; the shaking chills and high temperature came on around 2 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours and getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: a sharp, constant pain high up on the right side under my ribs, and I keep getting drenching shakes and shivers
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is agony and I feel really, really unwell — worse than I've ever felt
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high up on the right side of my tummy, under the ribs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, not coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I took paracetamol a couple of hours ago and it did nothing for the fever or the pain
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps getting worse on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: terrible nausea and I keep vomiting, my eyes and skin look yellow, and my wee has gone really dark today
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've been told before that I have gallstones, but I've never felt anything like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't get out of bed, I can't walk without help, and I'm shaking too much to do anything

past_medical_history.how_managed: never had surgery for them; nothing done about them so far

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some a couple of hours ago for the fever

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home, her husband is with her and made the call because she is too unwell to manage on her own

objective_data_offered.value: the home thermometer read a bit over 39 degrees
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a household thermometer while actively shivering

objective_data_offered.value: the whites of her eyes and her skin look distinctly yellow on video
urine has turned dark, like the colour of strong tea, since this morning
husband reports she is sweaty and clammy, shaking with rigors, looks very unwell and is confined to bed
a bowl by the bed with greenish-yellow (bilious) vomit in it
